behavior_summary: This script implements the in-world behavior for a marble item: a short examination description and physics-like reactions when used or struck.
U8P_MARBLE::look responds to player 'U8P_MARBLE::look' by showing the short text "rolling sphere" and then suspending (no other side effects).

U8P_MARBLE::use computes a relative vector between the marble and a reference object/actor, normalizes or randomizes magnitudes when needed, chooses direction signs (or randomizes signs if aligned), then calls Item::hurl to throw/push the marble with computed X/Y offsets.
U8P_MARBLE::hit records that the marble was U8P_MARBLE::hit by OR-ing a status bit (0x4000) and conditionally clears another status mask (~0x0400) when the hitter's Item::getType equals 0x00D7.

U8P_MARBLE::gotHit, when given a non-zero source (param1), computes a displacement vector from the source to the marble scaled by param2, hurls the marble away using Item::hurl, and—if the source type equals 0x00D7—also calls Item::hurl to hurl the source in the opposite direction.
notable_control_flow: U8P_MARBLE::look: single linear path — bark "rolling sphere" then suspend/terminate.

U8P_MARBLE::use: computes X/Y deltas = this.CX - reference.CX and this.CY - reference.CY, stores absolute magnitudes and signs; if either delta is zero both axes are randomized with urandom(0x10) and signs randomized; otherwise one axis may be normalized to magnitude 0x10 and the other scaled proportionally; final magnitudes are sampled with urandom(max) and multiplied by stored sign before Item::hurl and suspend.
U8P_MARBLE::hit: sets status bit (Item::orStatus(0x4000)) unconditionally; copies param1 to a local and if Item::getType(local) == 0x00D7 then clears bits via Item::andStatus(~0x0400).

U8P_MARBLE::gotHit: early-exit if param1 == 0; otherwise compute scaled deltas (this - source) * param2 / 0x10, call Item::hurl(this) with those offsets; if Item::getType(source) == 0x00D7 also call Item::hurl(source) with negated offsets.
open_questions: What is the identity/role of the 'reference' object used by U8P_MARBLE::use (raw refers to addressof([SP-00h]) ) — player, holder, or nearest actor? (inferred, confidence: low).

What concrete entity/type does item type 0x00D7 represent in the game (special object, NPC, player-controlled pawn)? This gates additional behavior in U8P_MARBLE::hit/U8P_MARBLE::gotHit (confidence: low).
Precise semantics of the status bits manipulated (0x4000 and 0x0400): their gameplay meaning is inferred as 'recently U8P_MARBLE::hit' / other flags but not canonical (confidence: low).

Exact deterministic/random distribution used after normalization (how often urandom sign fallback triggers in real gameplay) — randomization heuristics inferred from urandom calls (confidence: medium).

main_function.name: U8P_MARBLE::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the player's short description when the marble is examined.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player performs a 'U8P_MARBLE::look' / examine action on the marble (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_MARBLE::look
function_map.role: display short description to player on examine

function_map.name: U8P_MARBLE::use
function_map.role: handle player/U8P_MARBLE::use interaction by computing direction and magnitude then throwing the marble using Item::hurl

function_map.name: U8P_MARBLE::hit
function_map.role: record U8P_MARBLE::hit status and perform a conditional status clear when hitter type == 0x00D7

function_map.name: U8P_MARBLE::gotHit
function_map.role: react to being U8P_MARBLE::hit by another item: compute scaled displacement and hurl this item (and possibly the source) accordingly

external_calls.purpose: read X coordinate of this and the reference object to compute X delta
read Y coordinate of this and the reference object to compute Y delta
randomize magnitudes and signs when deltas are zero or to choose final offset magnitudes
apply the computed X/Y offsets to move/launch the marble (implements the throw/push)
set a U8P_MARBLE::hit/status bit (0x4000) on this item to mark it as U8P_MARBLE::hit
check the type of the hitting item (param1) to gate conditional status clearing
clear status bits (~0x0400) on this item when the hitter type equals 0x00D7
read X centers of this and the source to compute scaled X displacement
read Y centers of this and the source to compute scaled Y displacement
hurl this item by computed offsets; conditionally hurl the source in the opposite direction if its type == 0x00D7
determine whether to also hurl the source (type check == 0x00D7)

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the in-world behavior for a marble item: a short examination description and physics-like reactions when used or struck.
